mapper.insert: insert into tbl_reply (ev_rno, ev_bno, ev_reply, ev_replyer) values(seq_reply.nextval, #{ev_bno}, #{ev_reply}, #{ev_replyer})
mapper.update: update ev_reply set reply = #{reply}, ev_updatedate = sysdate where ev_rno = #{ev_rno}
mapper.select: select ev_rno, ev_bno, ev_reply, ev_replyer, ev_replyDate, ev_updatedate from ev_reply where ev_bno = #{ev_bno} order by ev_rno asc
